text_blocks.text: Manning finished the year with a career-low 67.9
passer rating, throwing for 2,249 yards and nine
Osweller threw for 1,967 yards, 10 touchdowns and
six interceptions for a rating of 86.4. Veterans
receiver Demaryius Thomas led the team with 105
receptions for 1,304 yards and six touchdowns, while
Emmanuel Sanders caught 76 passes for 1,135 yards
and six scores, while adding another 106 yards
returning punts. Fight end Owen Daniels was also a
big element of the passing game with 46 receptions for
517 yards. Running back C. J. Anderson was the
team's leading rusher. 863 yards and seven
touchdowns, while also catching 25 passes for 183
yards. Running back Ronnie Hillman also made a big
receptions, and a 4.7 yards per carry average.
Overall, the offense ranked 19th in scoring with 355
points and did not have any Pro Bowl selections.
